description: Keep lexer-native numeric literals inside a schema-valid byte frame so prompt-planned numeric components remain reachable

decision.retain: model.twotower v224 numeric-frame repair and config.levers v16 centralized changed-test parallelism
decision.reject: soft plan weight 1, pre-repair fallback arms, visible-role composition E790, checkpoint promotion, and ship claims
decision.reason: The repair removes the Slider dead end and enables a zero-fallback plan-margin replay, but the full-suite component gain trades away marker fidelity
decision.next: make declared marker coverage authoritative inside planned families before considering the margin for a canonical policy

recipe.matrix_set: E781-E790 targeted settings diagnostics plus held_out n=5

arms.result: AgentV dependency resolution failed in the isolated worktree; invalid evidence
five plan applications, zero choice changes, metrics identical to the settings control
selected Slider then exposed an empty compiler forest at the numeric literal opener; fallback_count=2
localized forced suffix crossing LIT_NUM; fallback_count=2
localized unrestricted byte selection inside the numeric frame; fallback_count=2
numeric automaton selected a valid digit; forced suffix still crossed the open frame; fallback_count=2
completed 1e1 then exposed forced suffix crossing LIT_END; fallback_count=2
localized divergent token-to-source conversion in persistent grammar state; fallback_count=2
retained targeted repair: meaningful-v1=1, fidelity=0.8, structure=0.4133, component_recall=0.5, fallback_count=0
full replay Pareto: meaningful-v1=0.6, fidelity=0.707619, structure=0.5622, component_recall=0.585714, fallback_count=0
visible-role/schema-role/coverage-close composition changed ownership but not targeted metrics; rejected no-effect arm

ship_gates.reason: five-record diagnostic subset; missing policy suites, strict-v2 zero, marker fidelity regression, and AgentV 0/1
